Sage Bot Item Code: AR37


Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Frost Monk Outfit

The unit's attack speed is increased by 30% for the duration of the battle.
Once in a while, the unit's attack speed increases by another 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, for 5 sec, the unit's attacks begin to restore health equal to 50% of the damage they deal and steal 10% magic pierce from the target of the attack for 3 sec. Stacks up to Stats 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100
